articles.title: iOS 27 adds an all-new app to your iPhone’s Home Screen
articles.summary: Apple announced iOS 27 at WWDC this week, coming with a ton of new Siri and Apple Intelligence features. One of the biggest changes here is the addition of an all-new Siri app. This marks the first time that Siri has been pre-installed as a standalone app for iPhone users …
articles.title_zh: iOS 27 在你的 iPhone 主屏幕上添加全新應用
articles.summary_zh: Apple 在本週的 WWDC 發佈了 iOS 27，帶來大量新的 Siri 和 Apple Intelligence 功能。最大的改變之一是新增獨立的 Siri 應用，這是 Siri 首次以預裝獨立應用的形式出現在 iPhone 上。

articles.title: AirPods Pro 3 are getting even better with iOS 27, order them today at their lowest price ever
articles.summary: While we are still slightly under a couple weeks out from Amazon’s massive summer sale event , the best Prime Day deal of the year might already be live right now – Apple’s AirPods Pro 3 have now dropped to the best price ever at $179 shipped. Plus, Apple just announced a bunch of new iOS 27 features for AirPods coming this year … so there’s no better time to jump in.
articles.title_zh: AirPods Pro 3 通過 iOS 27 變得更好，現在以史上最低價購買
articles.summary_zh: Apple 的 AirPods Pro 3 現已降至有史以來最低價格 $179，同時 Apple 剛剛為 iOS 27 宣佈了多項新功能。

articles.title: Indie App Spotlight: ‘oh my hours’ counts the hours you’ve wasted, not your screen time
articles.summary: Welcome to Indie App Spotlight . This is a weekly 9to5Mac series where we showcase the latest apps in the indie app world. If you’re a developer and would like your app featured, get in contact . Many people want to spend less time on their iPhones, whether that be for productivity, socializing more, or something else. Screen time tools prove useful here, providing users with an idea of how much time they’re spending on their iPhones. For many people, though, they end up being too lenient to be effective. With ‘ oh my hours ’ – the app flips the script, and instead makes you aware of how many hours you’ve wasted in an undesired app, rather than simply telling you you’ve hit your screen time limit.
articles.title_zh: 獨立應用聚焦：'oh my hours' 計算你浪費的時間，而不是屏幕時間
articles.summary_zh: 這是 9to5Mac 的每週系列，展示獨立應用世界中的最新應用。許多人希望在 iPhone 上花費更少的時間，無論是為了提高生產力還是更多地社交。

articles.title: Hands-on: Belkin’s new 25W MagSafe battery packs 10,000mAh for your iPhone
articles.summary: Belkin has a beefy new 25W MagSafe battery on the market – packing a whopping 10,000mAh of capacity. It has two killer new features: a kickstand, and a second MagSafe ring. Initially unveiled back at CES 2026, it’s now available for purchase.
articles.title_zh: 動手測試：Belkin 新款 25W MagSafe 電池擁有 10,000mAh 容量，適配你的 iPhone
articles.summary_zh: Belkin 推出了新款 25W MagSafe 電池，容量高達 10,000mAh，具有支架和第二個 MagSafe 環等創新功能。該產品已於 CES 2026 首次亮相，現已開放購買。

articles.title: HeyPolo is a smarter Find My app for family, friends, and co-workers
articles.summary: There are a number of ways to share your location with family and friends, from Apple’s built-in Find My app to location pins in messaging apps like WhatsApp. HeyPolo aims to deliver smarter features, including even greater privacy controls than available in the Find My app. The app was developed by the team behind leading VPN provider Surfshark, with seven key features on offer.
articles.title_zh: HeyPolo 是一款針對家人、朋友和同事的更智能的 Find My 應用
articles.summary_zh: HeyPolo 提供比 Apple 內置 Find My 應用更智能的位置共享功能，包括更強大的隱私控制。

articles.title: What new Google Messages features are rolling out [June 2026]
articles.summary: Like other Google apps, Messages for Android A/B tests many features. It can take the RCS/SMS client a rather long time to actually launch new functionality in stable. From various reports, Google announcements , and devices we’ve checked, this is the current state of Messages.
articles.title_zh: Google Messages 推出哪些新功能 [2026 年 6 月]
articles.summary_zh: Google Messages 針對 Android 進行了多項功能測試，本文介紹了當前 RCS/SMS 客戶端的最新功能狀態。

articles.title: Upgrade your summer soccer watch party with these top tech gadgets
articles.summary: It’s officially watch party season, especially with a certain special soccer event happening right about now. To celebrate the occasion, we’ve partnered with brands producing some cutting-edge tech to show you the ultimate soccer watch party setup. Keep your watch party pool clean with the WYBOT S3
articles.title_zh: 用這些頂級科技小工具升級你的夏季足球觀賽派對
articles.summary_zh: 隨著足球賽事的進行，我們與科技品牌合作推薦了終極足球觀賽派對設置的必備科技產品。

articles.title: Weekly poll: what do you think about iOS 27?
articles.summary: It was a busy week over at Cupertino, California – the annual WWDC introduced the latest versions of Apple’s key operating systems. Let’s focus in on iOS – what did you think about its new features and improvements? If you need a refresher or you missed the announcement altogether, here’s what’s new in iOS 27. The headlining feature this week – not just for iOS but the whole WWDC – is the new Siri AI. This and the next generation of Apple Intelligence. iOS 27 But there were other changes too, like Apple trying to polish the maligned Liquid Glass design language. Also, iPhones...
articles.title_zh: 每週投票：你如何看待 iOS 27？
articles.summary_zh: 本週 Cupertino 的年度 WWDC 大會推出了 Apple 最新的作業系統版本。讓我們關注 iOS 的新功能和改進。

articles.title: Weekly poll results: the Motorola Razr Fold is pricey, but may have a future despite its flaws
articles.summary: Like with other book-style foldables, Motorola Razr Fold’s biggest flaw is its price – indeed, in last week’s poll, the biggest group of voters was the one that gave the price tag a thumbs down. To put it in concrete terms, the Fold has an MSRP of EUR 2,000 / GBP 1,800 / INR 150,000 / USD 1,900 / CAD 2,700. That’s not the only problem, but the high cost of the device amplifies its other issues. For one, Motorola promises 7 years of OS updates and security patches. That’s on par with what other manufacturers promise and better than most other Motorolas. However, Moto just doesn’t have the...
articles.title_zh: 每週投票結果：Motorola Razr Fold 價格昂貴，但儘管有缺陷仍可能有前景
articles.summary_zh: 與其他書式摺疊手機一樣，Motorola Razr Fold 的最大缺陷是價格，MSRP 為 $1,900 美元。

articles.title: Deals: Galaxy S26+ gets a deeper discount on its 512GB model, Galaxy S26 Ultra also on sale
articles.summary: This week saw the annual WWDC from Apple. The week before, it was Google I/O – both are software-focused events, so there wasn’t any new hardware. So, we turn to older models instead. The Samsung Galaxy S26+ is not going to win any popularity contests, but it’s a solid middle-of-the-road smartphone that offers a good balance of features, support and price. Right now, the 512GB model is down to $900 – that’s the same price as the 256GB version, but note that only the Black units have such a deep cut. The Cobalt Violet is the second best at $1,020, which is a rather large gap. If you don’t...
articles.title_zh: 優惠：Galaxy S26+ 512GB 型號獲得更深折扣，Galaxy S26 Ultra 也在促銷中
articles.summary_zh: 本週舉行了 Apple 的年度 WWDC，前一週是 Google I/O，兩者都是軟件為主的活動。Samsung Galaxy S26+ 是一款不錯的中端智能手機選擇。

articles.title: Samsung Galaxy S26 series gets a feature that many other Android phones had for years
articles.summary: Samsung's Galaxy-branded smartphones and tablets have been lacking a feature that many other Android devices, especially from Chinese brands, had for years. We are talking about the real-time network speed indicator displayed in the status bar, now available for Galaxy users via the QuickStar module in Samsung's Good Lock customization app. Samsung users could get a real-time network speed indicator on their Galaxy phone, but it required a third-party app or enabling a firmware flag if the device was rooted. But that's not needed now if your device is running the Android 17-based One UI 9,...
articles.title_zh: Samsung Galaxy S26 系列獲得許多其他 Android 手機多年前就有的功能
articles.summary_zh: Samsung Galaxy 智能手機和平板電腦現已支持實時網速指示器功能，該功能通過 QuickStar 模組在狀態欄中顯示。

articles.title: Trump’s Name (Set in the Wrong Font, of Course) Has Been Removed From the Kennedy Center
articles.title_zh: Trump 的名字（設置在錯誤的字體中，當然）已從甘迺迪表演中心移除

articles.title_zh: Apple 的 Private Cloud Compute 對第三方開發者的限制嚴重

articles.title_zh: 美國政府指示 Anthropic 以國家安全為由關閉 Fable 5 和 Mythos 5 模型

articles.title: As Anthropic suspends access to new models, India debates its AI future
articles.summary: Tech leaders debate whether the Anthropic episode is a wake-up call for India’s AI ambitions.
articles.title_zh: Anthropic 暫停新模型訪問，印度辯論其 AI 未來
articles.summary_zh: 科技領袖們辯論 Anthropic 事件是否是印度 AI 野心的警鐘。

articles.title: Meta reportedly moves to unwind $2B Manus deal after Beijing’s demand
articles.summary: Meta starts dismantling its $2 billion Manus acquisition after Beijing ordered the deal reversed.
articles.title_zh: Meta 據報在北京要求後開始撤銷 20 億美元 Manus 交易
articles.summary_zh: Meta 在北京下令反轉交易後，開始拆除其 20 億美元的 Manus 收購。

articles.title: KPMG pulls report on AI usage due to apparent hallucinations
articles.summary: Once again, AI proves to be an unreliable source of information about AI.
articles.title_zh: KPMG 因明顯幻覺撤回 AI 使用報告
articles.summary_zh: AI 再次證明是關於 AI 資訊的不可靠來源。

articles.title: Amazon CEO reportedly raised Anthropic model concerns before government crackdown
articles.summary: Amazon CEO Andy Jassy may have been the source of security concerns that led Anthropic to cut off worldwide access to two models on Friday.
articles.title_zh: Amazon CEO 據報在政府打擊前提出 Anthropic 模型安全顧慮
articles.summary_zh: Amazon CEO Andy Jassy 可能是導致 Anthropic 在周五切斷全球兩個模型訪問的安全顧慮來源。

articles.title: OpenAI faces investigation from state attorneys general
articles.summary: It's not clear which states are involved, but they're asking about everything from OpenAI's ad policies to its handling of health data.
articles.title_zh: OpenAI 面臨州檢察長調查
articles.summary_zh: 尚不清楚涉及哪些州，但他們正詢問從 OpenAI 廣告政策到其健康數據處理的所有事項。

articles.title: Anterix: ‘Terrific’ results from NTN testing with Lynk Global
articles.summary: In sum, what to know: –Taking NTN beyond consumers: Anterix, which owns 900 MHz spectrum and targets the utility and enterprise private wireless space, is testing space-based direct-to-device connectivity with the aim of providing utilities with NTN connectivity. –Device line-up:…
articles.title_zh: Anterix：與Lynk Global的NTN測試獲得「驚人」成果
articles.summary_zh: Anterix擁有900 MHz頻譜並針對公用事業和企業私有無線領域，正在測試基於衛星的直連設備連接，旨在為公用事業提供NTN連接能力。

articles.title: Fable 5 and Mythos 5 remain suspended: “The ball is in Anthropic’s court”
articles.summary: On Friday evening, Anthropic suddenly disabled its new flagship models, Fable 5 and Mythos 5, after the U.S. government became aware of a way to perform a specific jailbreak on Fable 5 and put it under an export control order. Since this order applies to all foreigners, including those in the U.S., Anthropic had no other choice but to disable these models for everybody. As of now, it is unclear what this jailbreak entailed, and Anthropic argues that what the government showed were “minor vulnerabilities” that “all appear relatively simple,” and that don’t go beyond the capabilities of other publicly available models. When Anthropic announced Fable 5 and Mythos 5, it noted that Fable 5 had undergone extensive red-teaming security exercises with the help of the
articles.title_zh: Fable 5 和 Mythos 5 仍處於暫停狀態：「球在 Anthropic 的場地上」
articles.summary_zh: Anthropic 在美國政府發現針對 Fable 5 的特定越獄方式後，於週五晚間突然停用其新旗艦模型 Fable 5 和 Mythos 5，並受到出口管制令約束。該命令適用於所有外國人，包括美國境內的人員。

articles.title: Why AI retrieval and ranking need more than vector search
articles.summary: A recent GigaOm CxO Decision Brief explores how AI retrieval architectures are evolving beyond flat vector databases as organizations combine semantic search, ranking, personalization, and machine learning inference in production systems. Vector search changed the AI infrastructure landscape by making semantic retrieval practical at scale. By converting text, images, and user behavior into embeddings, organizations could move beyond exact keyword matching and retrieve information based on meaning. But production AI systems rarely stop at vector similarity. A real-world query often requires multiple signals to be evaluated simultaneously. Semantic relevance may be one factor, but so are structured attributes, business rules, personalization signals, freshness, access controls, recommendatio
articles.title_zh: 為什麼 AI 檢索和排名需要超越向量搜尋
articles.summary_zh: GigaOm CxO Decision Brief 探討了 AI 檢索架構如何超越扁平向量資料庫，透過在生產系統中結合語義搜尋、排名、個性化和機器學習推論來演進。向量搜尋通過改變 AI 基礎設施格局而使組織能夠提升搜尋能力。

articles.title: Can JetBrains close the IDE skills gap before AI widens it further?
articles.summary: JetBrains recently launched a program to bring hands-on coding practice into its professional development environments, targeting the gap between how programming is taught online and how it’s practiced in the industry. The JetBrains Course Creators Program , announced last month, lets independent educators on platforms like Udemy, Coursera , LinkedIn Learning, and Pluralsight embed practical exercises directly into JetBrains IDEs via the JetBrains Academy plugin . The pitch is that students shouldn’t just watch videos and take quizzes — they should write, run, and debug code in the same tools they’ll encounter on the job. “Online programming education still has a major gap: students learn concepts through videos and browser-based exercises but rarely get to co
articles.title_zh: JetBrains 能否在 AI 進一步擴大技能差距之前彌補 IDE 技能缺口？
articles.summary_zh: JetBrains 最近推出了一項計畫，將實踐編碼引入其專業開發環境，旨在縮小線上程式設計教學方式與業界實踐方式之間的差距。該 JetBrains Course Creators Program 上月宣布，允許獨立開發者參與。

articles.title: Loops are replacing prompts. Verification is about to be your biggest problem.
articles.summary: Something shifted in the AI coding discourse this month. The argument is no longer about whether agents can write production code or which model is best. It is about who, or what, should be prompting them. The phrase that captured it, “design loops that prompt your agents,” set off a week of discussion that Matt Van Horn synthesized well . Strip away the noise, and the signal is clear: A third era of agentic development is taking shape, and it raises significant questions about what engineers do, what software delivery costs, and what infrastructure must exist beneath it. For teams building cloud-native applications on Kubernetes, the answers to those three questions are about to matter a great deal. Three eras, one direction Agentic development has moved the human up one level
articles.title_zh: 迴圈正在取代提示詞。驗證即將成為你最大的問題
articles.summary_zh: 本月 AI 編碼討論中發生了轉變，焦點不再是代理能否編寫生產程式碼或哪個模型最佳，而是誰或什麼應該提示它們。「設計提示你的代理的迴圈」這一表述引發了廣泛討論。

articles.title: Starmer to Meet Japan’s Takaichi as Fighter Jet Funding Sputters
articles.summary: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer will meet his Japanese counterpart Sanae Takaichi on Sunday as uncertainty mounts over their joint fighter jet program with Italy because of doubts about the UK’s commitment.
articles.title_zh: 史達默將與日本高市會面 戰鬥機聯合開發資金陷入困境
articles.summary_zh: 英國首相基爾·史達默將於週日與日本首相高市早苗會面，因英國承諾引發疑慮，三國聯合戰鬥機開發計劃前景不明。

articles.title: Review: Disclosure Day is big on action, light on ideas
articles.summary: The summer blockbuster season has kicked off in earnest with the theatrical release of Disclosure Day , director Steven Spielberg’s highly anticipated return to his “aliens are among us” sci-fi roots. Verdict: there's not much fresh or original here as movies about aliens go, but it's a fast-paced film with a luminous performance by Emily Blunt that won't fail to entertain. (Some spoilers below but no major reveals.) The first half of the film is essentially a political thriller—shades of 1974's The Parallax View and similar films—as global tensions have the world teetering on the brink of World War III. A cybersecurity specialist named Daniel (Josh O'Connor) has stolen a piece of alien technology and highly classified files from his employer, Wardex Corporation, a top-secret extension of
articles.title_zh: 評論：Disclosure Day 動作十足但缺乏創意
articles.summary_zh: 暑期大片檔期如火如荼展開，Steven Spielberg執導的Disclosure Day上映，標誌其回歸「外星人在我們身邊」科幻題材的力作；雖然創意不足，但節奏緊湊精彩。
